start.speaker: Hopeful
start.text: I watched you refuse what this fair sells, not because it was ugly, but because peace was worth more. Something in me woke when I saw it. Let me walk the rest of the road with you.

choices.text: Gladly. The road has taught me I was not made to walk alone.
choices.text_zh: 求之不得。这路教会我：我本不是被造来独自行走的。

choices.text: The way ahead is darker than the fair admits. Are you sure?
choices.text_zh: 前路比这集市所承认的更黑暗。你确定吗？

text_variants.text: I saw them take Faithful — saw how he died without bitterness, even singing. His blood is the reason I am standing here. What the two of you refused to buy, I now refuse as well. Let me take his place at your side.
text_variants.text_zh: 我看见他们带走了忠信——看见他怎样毫无苦毒地死去，口里还在歌唱。他的血，是我此刻站在这里的缘由。你们二人所不肯买的，如今我也不买了。让我接替他，站到你的身旁。

text_variants.text: Some pilgrims hurry past the Interpreter's rooms; you stayed and considered them all — I heard it on the road, and I see it now in how you refused this fair. Let me walk the rest of the way with one who learned to look.
text_variants.text_zh: 有些朝圣者匆匆掠过讲解者的房间；你却留下、把每一间都细细参详——这我在路上听说过，如今从你拒绝这集市的样子也看得出。让我与一个学会了看的人同行。

text_variants.text: The wayside-keepers tell of a pilgrim who knelt at every little chapel on the road — even the ones tucked where no eye but Heaven's could see. That was you. A heart that still stops to pray is one I would gladly walk beside; let me come with you.
text_variants.text_zh: 路边小堂的守护者说起一位朝圣者，在路上每一座小堂都跪过——连那些无人、唯有天看得见的也跪过。那就是你。肯停下祷告的心，我愿与之同行；让我同你去吧。

text_variants.text: I watched your clear eyes turn from every glittering lie this fair could shout. That kind of sight is rare and costly. Something in me woke when I saw it — let me walk the rest of the road with you.
text_variants.text_zh: 我看着你清明的眼，从这集市所能叫嚷的每一句闪亮谎言上转开。那样的眼光稀有而昂贵。我看见时，心里有什么醒了过来——让我陪你走完余下的路。

start.text_zh: 我看着你拒绝了这集市所卖的——不是因它丑陋，而是因平安更可贵。我看见时，心里有什么醒了过来。让我陪你走完余下的路。

sure.speaker: Hopeful
sure.text: Dark and hard is where hope must become more than a word. I am sure.

choices.text: Then come, Hopeful. We will keep each other awake.
choices.text_zh: 那就来吧，盼望。我们彼此叫醒。

sure.text_zh: 黑暗与艰难，正是盼望必须超过一句空话之处。我确定。

set_out.speaker: Hopeful
set_out.text: Lead on. When your courage runs low, I will remember aloud what we have already seen.
set_out.text_zh: 你带路。你勇气低落时，我会把我们已经见过的，大声替你记起来。
